backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the No-button update to specific frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON list summarizing all frontend files and their roles in the Valentine app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus CSS variables defining light/dark romantic color themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Renders the ValentinePage component as the root of the app.
frontend/src/components/animations/celeb: CSS animations for fireworks, floating hearts, fade-ins, and scale effects used in celebrations.
Displays animated fireworks and floating hearts with a replay option after a Yes response.
A No button that dodges pointer approach and jumps to a random viewport spot after each click.
frontend/src/components/ValentineDecor.t: Provides background images, flowers, and animated hearts for the Valentine page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useEvasiveButton.ts: Logic for moving the No button away from the pointer and picking random safe positions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity auth state, login flow, and persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and a large set of custom OKLCH-based romantic theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and loads global styles.
frontend/src/pages/ValentinePage.tsx: Implements the main Valentine interaction page with Yes/No logic, escalating prompts, and celebration view switching.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme extensions, custom colors mapped to CSS variables, fonts, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, requirements, and feature tracking for the Valentine app.
